事.origin: A busy hand 彐 holding a brush over a mouth 口 — keeping track of all the affairs and matters of the day.

sentence.en: I have something to tell you.

可.origin: A mouth 口 saying 'yes, that's fine' — 可 means can or may, like giving the okay.

别.origin: A knife 刂 on the right draws a line to separate 另 things — 别 means to part or 'don't'.

sentence.en: Don't forget to bring your schoolbag.

洗.origin: Water 氵 on the left plus 先 — splash water first to get clean. 洗 means to wash.

澡.origin: Water 氵 plus 喿 — pour lots of water all over yourself. 澡 means to bathe.

sentence.en: I take a bath every evening.

还.origin: The walking path 辶 wrapping around 不 — to go back, or 'still' more to come.

收.origin: A hand with a stick 攵 reaching out to gather things in — 收 means to collect.

sentence.en: Please put the books away neatly.

拾.origin: A hand 扌 bringing things together 合 — bend down and pick them up. 拾 means to gather.

sentence.en: I help mom tidy up the room.

扫.origin: A hand 扌 holding a broom 彐 — sweep the floor clean. 扫 means to sweep.

饿.origin: Food 饣 beside 我 (me) — when my tummy wants food, I feel 饿, hungry.

喂.origin: A mouth 口 plus 畏 — open your mouth and call out 'hey!' 喂 grabs attention.

灯.origin: Fire 火 on the left plus 丁 — a little flame that gives light. 灯 means lamp.

sentence.en: It's dark, let's turn on the light.

街.origin: A crossroads 行 wrapped around 圭 — where people walk between houses. 街 is a street.

sentence.en: There are many people on the street.

道.origin: A walking path 辶 led by a head 首 — the road, or the way to go. 道 means way.

长.origin: Picture an old man with long, flowing hair and a cane — 长 means long.

交.origin: A person standing with legs crossed over each other — 交 means to cross or connect.

通.origin: A walking path 辶 plus 甬 — the road runs straight through. 通 means to pass through.

sentence.en: This road leads to the school.

忙.origin: A heart 忄 next to 亡 — so much to do your heart races. 忙 means busy.

往.origin: A small step 彳 heading toward 王 — set off and go that way. 往 means to go toward.

拉.origin: A hand 扌 next to 立 (stand) — grab hold and tug. 拉 means to pull.

停.origin: A person 亻 resting by a pavilion 亭 — pause and take a break. 停 means to stop.

sentence.en: The car stopped at the gate.

快.origin: A heart 忄 that decides 夬 in a flash — quick thinking. 快 means fast.

带.origin: Picture a belt with cloth 巾 hanging below — it ties around you. 带 means belt or to carry.

那.origin: Point far away to the right side 阝 — 那 means 'that' one over there.

拿.origin: Two hands joining 合 with a hand 手 below — grab it tight. 拿 means to take.

奇.origin: A big person 大 over 可 — looking at something amazing! 奇 means strange or wonderful.

他.origin: A person 亻 plus 也 (also) — another person, a 'he'. 他 means he or him.

点.origin: Fire dots 灬 beneath 占 — tiny sparks like little dots. 点 means a dot or point.

该.origin: Words 讠 plus 亥 — when someone reminds you it's 'your turn'. 该 means should or ought to.

回.origin: A little square inside a big square 囗 — like a spiral curling back. 回 means to return.

sentence.en: School is over, we go home.

吧.origin: A mouth 口 plus 巴 — a soft sound at the end of a sentence. 吧 means 'let's' or 'okay?'.

付.origin: A person 亻 with a hand 寸 — handing something over. 付 means to pay or deliver.

医.origin: An arrow 矢 tucked inside a box 匸 — pulling out what hurts. 医 means to heal.

sentence.en: The doctor is good at treating illness.

院.origin: A place 阝 plus 完 — walls around an open space. 院 means a yard or courtyard.

sentence.en: Grandpa is resting in the hospital.

得.origin: A small step 彳 and a hand 寸 reaching for a treasure 旦 — 得 means to get.

急.origin: A pressing hand over a heart 心 — your heart beats fast. 急 means anxious or in a hurry.

病.origin: The sickness sign 疒 (a person on a bed) plus 丙 — 病 means illness.

要.origin: A woman 女 with hands on her waist 覀 — standing firm about what she wants. 要 means to want.

sentence.en: I want a glass of milk.

药.origin: Plants 艹 on top plus 约 — herbs that make you better. 药 means medicine.

sentence.en: When sick, you must take medicine.

就.origin: A tall city 京 beside 尤 — head straight there right away. 就 means at once or just.
